title: Fix Date Picker CSS for Dark Mode on Reports and Metrics Pages
story: As a DataTools Pro user in dark mode, I want the date picker on Reports/Dashboards and Metrics pages to render with proper dark mode styling, so that the date controls are readable and usable.
description:
The date picker dropdowns on the Reports and Dashboards page do not render correctly in dark mode — the styling conflicts with the dark background.

## Fix
Apply dark mode CSS overrides to the date picker component. The same issue was also found on the Metrics page (Add Metrics) and was fixed simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: Date picker on Reports and Dashboards renders correctly in dark mode
Date picker on Metrics page renders correctly in dark mode
Date range filters (Date Created, Last Modified) have proper dark mode styling
Calendar popup and preset options are readable in dark mode
ux_changes: Dark mode CSS applied to date picker components on Reports/Dashboards and Metrics pages.
implementation_notes: Same date picker CSS issue found on both Reports/Dashboards (Date Created, Last Modified filters) and Metrics (Add Metrics) pages. Fixed in both locations. Related to MBT-762.
comment_summary: Developer found the same dark mode date picker issue on the Metrics page while fixing it for Reports/Dashboards. Both were fixed together. Confirmed working on staging.
